keyMappings:
unmap n
unmap N
unmap e
unmap E
unmap i
unmap I
unmap o
unmap O
unmap h
unmap H
unmap k
unmap K
unmap <Space>
unmap gt
unmap gT

# NEIO = ← ↓ ↑ →
map n scrollLeft
map e scrollDown
map i scrollUp
map o scrollRight

# half-page + top/bottom (E=<C-d>, I=<C-u>, N=Home, O=End)
map E scrollPageDown
map I scrollPageUp
map N scrollToTop
map O scrollToBottom

# find next/prev on h/H (like nnoremap h n / H N)
map h performFind
map H performBackwardsFind

# “insert” & input focus
map k enterInsertMode
map K focusInput

# tabs (gt/gT parity)
map gt nextTab
map gT previousTab

# leader omnibar
map : Vomnibar.activate
searchEngines:
w: https://www.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special:Search&search=%s Wikipedia

# More examples.
#
# (Vimium supports search completion Wikipedia, as
# above, and for these.)
#
g: https://www.google.com/search?q=%s Google
l: https://www.google.com/search?q=%s&btnI I'm feeling lucky...
y: https://www.youtube.com/results?search_query=%s Youtube
# gm: https://www.google.com/maps?q=%s Google maps
# b: https://www.bing.com/search?q=%s Bing
# d: https://duckduckgo.com/?q=%s DuckDuckGo
# az: https://www.amazon.com/s/?field-keywords=%s
# qw: https://www.qwant.com/?q=%s Qwant
